title: xeranthemum tenuifolium
intro: Xeranthemum tenuifolium, also known as the slender yellow everlasting, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Xeranthemum tenuifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health and well-being.
